monster.name: Domina Lella

action.name: **Rolling Pin.** +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. *Hit:* 1d4+2 bludgeoning damage.
DM Notes
action.text: Doesn't fight seriously, but the rolling pin is a credible threat at the table. STR 14 and Intimidation reflect the fact that nobody in Fianus Romanus dares contradict her. Knows everything about everyone, but you have to pay her or treat her well to get her to talk.

monster.description: - Practical, direct, zero diplomacy - Enormous portions, precise bill - Knows everything about everyone in Fianus Romanus, but information costs - The rolling pin isn't just for cooking
